description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring a dark gable roof and white exterior walls. The front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, leading to a set of steps and a paved walkway. Large rectangular windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing a balanced and classic appearance. The property includes a driveway leading to an attached garage on the right side, and a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and landscaped greenery. Mature trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the house, enhancing its curb appeal and providing privacy. The overall design reflects a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A two-story white house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, a columned front porch, attached garage, and a backyard pool with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the columned porch, main entryway, symmetrical windows, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the backyard pool area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and landscaping, with the back of the house and garage visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional trees, and the full depth of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, columns, steps, and a paved walkway
